name: 3M CO
summary: 3M Company is a diversified technology company operating in three segments: Safety and Industrial, Transportation and Electronics, and Consumer. Products include industrial abrasives, electrical materials, personal safety equipment, automotive solutions, semiconductor materials, display films, cleaning products, and consumer adhesives. Key brands include Scotch, Post-it, Nexcare, Command, Filtrete, and 3M Cubitron. Products are sold globally through wholesalers, retailers, distributors, and e-commerce channels.
